title: First-Line Supervisors of Passenger Attendants
description: Supervise and coordinate activities of passenger attendants.

tasks.text: Analyze and record personnel or operational data and write related activity reports.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Apply customer feedback to service improvement efforts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Compute or estimate cash, payroll, transportation, or personnel requirements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Confer with customers, supervisors, contractors, or other personnel to exchange information or to resolve problems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct or coordinate the activities of workers, such as flight or car attendants.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Explain and demonstrate work tasks to new workers or assign training tasks to experienced workers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inform workers about interests or special needs of specific groups.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect materials, stock, vehicles, equipment, or facilities to ensure that they are safe, free of defects, and consistent with specifications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Inspect work areas or operating equipment to ensure conformance to established standards in areas such as cleanliness or maintenance.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Meet with managers or other supervisors to stay informed of changes affecting operations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Observe and evaluate workers' appearance and performance to ensure quality service and compliance with specifications.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Participate in continuing education to stay abreast of industry trends and developments.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Recommend and implement measures to improve worker motivation, work methods, or customer services.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Requisition necessary supplies, equipment, or services.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Resolve customer complaints regarding worker performance or services rendered.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Take disciplinary action to address performance problems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Train workers in proper operational procedures and functions and explain company policies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
